task: Advanced high-value task: Finite-Capacity Plant Schedule Readiness Evidence Matrix. Scenario: a governance team wants a reproducible analysis that another reviewer can rerun from the row data alone for finite-capacity plant schedule. Embedded packet: Records: R1 duration_hours=52 due_day=85 machine_capacity_hours=1; R2 duration_hours=61 due_day=81 machine_capacity_hours=4; R3 duration_hours=47 due_day=96 machine_capacity_hours=0. Remediation options: O1 changes duration_hours by -12% cost=81500; O2 changes due_day by -18% cost=98300; O3 changes machine_capacity_hours by -25% cost=57700; max_budget=123600. Rules and constraints: minimize late jobs first then changeover; jobs cannot split across machines; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: quantify the operational consequence of each exception and rank follow-up actions by urgency and evidentiary strength. Deliver finite_capacity_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
